fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

license_types.title: Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist
license_types.description: Full credential for independent SLP practice in Washington.

license_types.description: For SLP graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship in Washington.

Submit Application to DOH
steps.description: Submit with fees to Washington DOH.

documents.detail: Washington State Patrol and FBI background check.

telepractice_text: Washington permits telepractice for licensed SLPs and is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
provisional_text: Washington issues an Interim SLP Permit for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.
reciprocity_text: Washington is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

faqs.question: How much does a Washington SLP license cost?
faqs.answer: $175 initial. $100 annual renewal (Washington uses annual renewal on your birthday).

faqs.question: Is Washington part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?
Does Washington allow telepractice for SLPs?
